series_metadata.series_title: Linked Deposit program daily activity and reconciliation documents
series_metadata.series_description: A packet of documents that includes a report from the investment inventory software that shows all linked deposit purchases, maturities and interest paid on a given day. This report is then reconciled against bank documents, which are also included in this packet, and that show the incoming and outgoing funds for the corresponding business day.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years. ; Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
